gap_summaries: [ultrathink] FIXED: resolve_template_ref did not handle multiple @ signs — added test_multiple_at_signs + implementation note to reject refs with >1 @
[ultrathink] FIXED: validate_manifest did not detect duplicate dst paths across categories — added test_duplicate_dst_across_categories + cross-category dedup check in interface spec

[ultrathink] FIXED: validate_manifest did not validate variable names as Python identifiers — added test_variable_name_invalid_identifier + str.isidentifier() check (required for string.Template compatibility)

[ultrathink] FIXED: global constraint claimed .tmpl suffix is 'stripped at instantiation' but manifest src/dst fields already handle the mapping — clarified wording to explain no runtime stripping needed
[ultrathink] FIXED: path safety in Task 10 reinvented containment check — now references existing _ensure_within pattern from product_profile.py:464
[ultrathink] minor: no dry-run mode for instantiation — useful for debugging but not needed for v1; can be added as list_template_files + resolve_variables without writing
[ultrathink] minor: SeedRenderError vs SeedTemplateError split across two modules — two exception types to catch; acceptable given clean module boundary but callers should note both
[ultrathink] minor: test file LOC estimates were ~250, raised to ~350 based on observed density of ~9 LOC/test in existing test files
[ultrathink] deferred: no telemetry/audit integration for seed template instantiation — correctly deferred to M19 orchestrator wiring
[ultrathink] deferred: profile.seed_template.url field is empty and URL-based template fetching is not implemented — future milestone; bundled templates are sufficient for v1
[ultrathink] deferred: no template update/diff/migration mechanism — only initial instantiation supported; incremental template updates deferred to post-keystone
